questions.question: Explain the importance of a business case in supporting the implementation of a new user experience design. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Business case refers to a clear justification of the costs and benefits of a new user experience. Provide a brief explanation of why a business case is essential.

questions.question: A company is considering redesigning its website to improve user engagement. A business case has been prepared, but the stakeholders are unhappy with the proposed budget. What action should the project manager take? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the potential consequences of not having a business case, and the impact on the project's success.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of a business case in the context of user experience design? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Business case refers to a formal justification of the costs and benefits of a new user experience design. Provide a brief explanation of the primary purpose of a business case.
